hero.description: Build your professional portfolio in minutes, connect your GitHub repos and share a URL that truly represents you.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Built for developers and professionals who want to stand out.

github.title: Connect with GitHub
github.description: Import your repositories directly and link them to your portfolio projects in one click.

url.title: Custom URL
url.description: Your portfolio lives at portf.io/your-username — a clean address you can share anywhere.

projects.title: Project management
projects.description: Organize and showcase your projects with title, description, image, technologies and link.

security.title: Secure access
security.description: Login with GitHub, Google or email. OAuth 2.0, JWT and encrypted data to keep your account safe.

skills.title: Technical skills
skills.description: Declare your technologies and competencies. Let your profile speak for you before the interview.

share.title: Share in seconds
share.description: One link, all the details. Share on LinkedIn, CV or directly with recruiters.

step1.title: Create your account
step1.description: Sign up with GitHub, Google or your email. No long forms.

step2.title: Build your profile
step2.description: Add projects, skills, bio and link your GitHub repos.

step3.title: Share your portfolio
step3.description: Get your public URL and use it on your CV, LinkedIn or anywhere.

why.title: Your work deserves to be seen
why.point1: Public profile with unique URL ready to share on any network
why.point2: Direct GitHub integration to showcase your real repositories
why.point3: Secure OAuth authentication — no weak passwords
why.point4: Clean, professional design that impresses from the first scroll

cta.title: Ready to stand out?
cta.description: Create your professional portfolio for free. No credit card, no limits.
cta.noCard: Free forever on the basic plan

footer.tagline: The simplest way to show your work to the world.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Sign up to get started with your professional portfolio
signup.errorUsernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters
signup.errorPasswordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
signup.errorGeneric: An error occurred while creating the account

loginDrawer.title: Sign in
loginDrawer.subtitle: Choose how you want to continue
loginDrawer.errorInvalid: Invalid credentials. Please check your username and password.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeSubtitle: Manage your professional portfolio from here.
dashboard.completeProfileHint: Add a photo, bio and more information to improve your portfolio.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.subtitle: Manage your portfolio projects
projects.empty: You don't have any projects yet
projects.emptyHint: Add projects to showcase your work in your portfolio
projects.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this project?

skills.title: My Skills
skills.subtitle: Showcase your technologies and competencies
skills.emptyHint: Add your technical skills to enrich your profile
skills.confirmDelete: Do you want to delete this skill?

repos.title: GitHub Repositories
repos.subtitle: Repositories of @{{username}}
repos.notConnectedHint: To see your GitHub repositories, sign in with your GitHub account.

profile.title: Edit Profile
profile.subtitle: Customize how you appear on your public portfolio
profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell us about yourself, your experience and what you're passionate about...

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: We couldn't load this page. Please try again later.

setup.title: Welcome! Set up your profile
setup.subtitle: Tell us a bit about yourself to personalize your portfolio.
setup.bioPlaceholder: Tell us about yourself, your experience or what you do...
setup.editLater: You can edit this information anytime from your profile.
setup.error: Could not save profile. Please try again.
